data.name: Error_User_Exists
data.value: An User with the same Email exists already.

data.name: EmailAddress
data.value: The {0} field is not a valid e-mail address.

data.name: StringLength
data.value: The field {0} must be a string with a maximum length of {1}.

data.name: Message_ThanksForConfirmation
data.value: Thank you very much for the email confirmation.

data.name: Message_Password_Reset
data.value: Please reset your password by <a href='{0}'>click here</a>

data.name: Message_ConfirmAccount
data.value: Please confirm your account by <a href='{0}'>click here</a>

data.name: IsPartOfASet
data.value: Is it part of a set?

data.name: IsGeneralState
data.value: Is it a general state, so not collection area specific?

data.name: Error_UserName_Change
data.value: An error occurred while changing user name.

data.name: RelatedGeography_Max1
data.value: There may only be one geographical reference.

data.name: BodyOfWaterName
data.value: Name of the body of water

data.name: Error_CollectionArea_NameEmpty
data.value: Collcetion area name cannot be empty.

data.name: Error_Error_Ocurred
data.value: An unexpected error occurred, which was tracked.

data.name: Success_CollectionItemPicture_Created
data.value: Collection item picture was created successfully.

data.name: Error_CollectionItemPicture_NotFound
data.value: Collection item picture was not found.

data.name: Success_CollectionItemPicture_Deleted
data.value: Collection item picture was deleted successfully.

data.name: Error_ParentPlace_ParentOfItsOwn
data.value: A place cannot be a parent to itself.

data.name: Password_Reset_ConfirmationSent
data.value: Link to reset your password, will be send to the given email address.

data.name: CollectionItemEntity_AttributesConcepts
data.value: Collection item additional attributes and general concepts

data.name: Delete_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete it?

data.name: Delete_NotAllowed
data.value: Entries can only be deleted after consultation with the administrator, as deletion can have negative effects on many collectibles.

data.name: CollectionItemEntity_Download_All
data.value: Download all collection items as YAML

data.name: Info_Prototype
data.value: This is a prototype in the beta phase. There is only one user. All data will be deleted later.

data.name: Message_NothingFound
data.value:
Unfortunately, nothing was found.

Please try another term.

data.name: AccountDelete_Confirm
data.value: Delete data and close my account.

data.name: AccountDelete_Notification
data.value: Deleting this data will remove your account and your collection. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Download_Notification
data.value: Before deleting your account, please download your entries first.

data.name: CollectionItem_DownloadAll
data.value: Download all datas to the collection items

data.name: PersonalData_Notification
data.value: Your account contains personal data that you have provided to us. Here you can download or delete this data.

data.name: Message_GeneralText_String
data.value:
This is an automatically generated email. If you have any questions, please contact service@uffheba.software.
Best regards

data.name: Message_GeneralText_Html
data.value: This is an automatically generated email. If you have any questions, please contact service@uffheba.software. Best regards

data.name: NothingFound
data.value: No entries found for the search term.

data.name: ParentPlace_Max1
data.value: There may only be one parent place.

data.name: IsGeneralConcept
data.value: IS it a general concept, so not collection area specific
